channel.title: Intel TDX on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Intel TDX on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In development] Announcing: Confidential Live Migration for Intel TDX confidential VMs in Azure
item.description:
Microsoft is introducing Confidential Live Migration in Azure for Intel TDX Confidential VMs. The feature is intended to support platform servicing by moving confidential VMs while preserving availability.

  • Source: Azure Updates
